question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the thesis chapters. Instead, it provides a project timeline/work plan. A thesis introduction should outline the structural components (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, etc.) of the final document.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes activities and deadlines for the development process rather than describing the contents of the thesis sections. There is no summary of what will be covered in each chapter of the written work.

question: Structure
feedback: The text describes the temporal structure of the research process (a timeline), but it does not provide the structural outline of the thesis itself. A reader cannot understand the organization of the final paper from this text.
